calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Margaret De Matteo, Esq., for the Plaintiff TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
Fallon Brown sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by MELONA MAYORGA.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 520 South Van Ness Avenue, Room #260, San Francisco, CA 94100.

Damages $0.00
Judgment for Possession only is entered. Plaintiff is not asking for damages.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Continued To Mar-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Lilian Sing, Clerk: Nancy Bautista, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Fallon Brown.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Melona Mayorga is present.
Attorney Audrey Siegel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Rebecca Gray, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. The trial date is continued to March 17, 2014 at 9:00a.m., in Department 501 for settlement protective date. Parties waive notice.
